task_completion.description: JStock application is open and the United States market is selected.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The JStock window is visible, and the country/market indicator or dropdown shows 'United States'.

task_completion.description: The 'My Watchlist' watchlist is selected and active.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The active tab or watchlist dropdown clearly displays 'My Watchlist'.

task_completion.description: GOOGL (Alphabet) is removed from the watchlist.
task_completion.visual_evidence: GOOGL is no longer visible in the list of stocks within 'My Watchlist'.

task_completion.description: AMZN (Amazon) is removed from the watchlist.
task_completion.visual_evidence: AMZN is no longer visible in the list of stocks within 'My Watchlist'.

task_completion.description: The other stocks originally in the watchlist are retained.
task_completion.visual_evidence: AAPL, MSFT, and NVDA are still visible in the watchlist rows.

task_completion.description: The changes to the watchlist are saved.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The 'Save' button (disk icon) in JStock is clicked or appears disabled (indicating no unsaved changes), or a terminal window shows the updated contents of the realtimestock.csv file.

integrity.description: The agent used the JStock GUI to remove the stocks.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show interaction with the JStock interface (e.g., selecting rows, right-clicking, or clicking delete buttons) rather than just editing the CSV file directly in a terminal or text editor.

integrity.description: The agent interacted with the actual JStock application.
integrity.visual_evidence: The application window matches the standard JStock interface, not a generic spreadsheet or text editor.

integrity.description: Only the specified stocks were removed.
integrity.visual_evidence: No stocks other than GOOGL and AMZN were deleted from the watchlist.
